title: polygala densifolia var. densifolia
intro: Polygala densifolia var. densifolia, also known as Yuan Zhi, is a plant species in the genus Polygala, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidant, and anti-anxiety effects. The health benefits of Polygala densifolia var. densifolia include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and enhanced cognitive function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
